testcase.name: contextLoads
testcase.system-out:
12:56:41.002 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.msedcl.main.customer.ApplicationTests]: ApplicationTests does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 12:56:41.163 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.msedcl.main.customer.Application for test class com.msedcl.main.customer.ApplicationTests 12:56:41.291 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.msedcl.main.customer.ApplicationTests]: ApplicationTests does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 12:56:41.296 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.msedcl.main.customer.Application for test class com.msedcl.main.customer.ApplicationTests 12:56:41.614 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.devtools.restart.RestartApplicationListener -- Restart disabled due to context in which it is running

testcase.system-err: Mockito is currently self-attaching to enable the inline-mock-maker. This will no longer work in future releases of the JDK. Please add Mockito as an agent to your build as described in Mockito's documentation: https://javadoc.io/doc/org.mockito/mockito-core/latest/org.mockito/org/mockito/Mockito.html#0.3 WARNING: A Java agent has been loaded dynamically (C:\Users\student3\.m2\repository\net\bytebuddy\byte-buddy-agent\1.17.8\byte-buddy-agent-1.17.8.jar) WARNING: If a serviceability tool is in use, please run with -XX:+EnableDynamicAgentLoading to hide this warning WARNING: If a serviceability tool is not in use, please run with -Djdk.instrument.traceUsage for more information WARNING: Dynamic loading of agents will be disallowed by default in a future release
